Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.label: Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text_Greeting
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.raw_text: 我是水下宝藏寻宝者！\p专门潜到深海打捞\n沉睡在海底的宝物！$
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.display_text:
我是水下宝藏寻宝者！

专门潜到深海打捞
沉睡在海底的宝物！

Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.label: Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text_HaveYouSeenAnyShards
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.raw_text: 告诉我，\n你见过古代工具的碎片吗？$
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.display_text:
告诉我，
你见过古代工具的碎片吗？

Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.label: Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text_YouHaventGotAnyShards
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.raw_text: 你手头没有宝物啊……\p如果你找到了碎片，比如红色碎片\n之类的，就来和我交换吧！$
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.display_text:
你手头没有宝物啊……

如果你找到了碎片，比如红色碎片
之类的，就来和我交换吧！

Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.label: Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text_ThatsAShardIllTradeYou
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.raw_text: 哦，哈！那个……\n那是碎片！我找的就是它们！\p啊，拜托，跟我交换吧！\n绝对给你好东西！$
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.display_text:
哦，哈！那个……
那是碎片！我找的就是它们！

啊，拜托，跟我交换吧！
绝对给你好东西！

Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.label: Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text_YoullTradeShardForStone
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.display_text:
要用你的{STR_VAR_1}换
我的{STR_VAR_2}吗？

Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.label: Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text_BagFull
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.raw_text: 啊呀，你的包包满了，\n清理掉一些东西吧，朋友！$
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.display_text:
啊呀，你的包包满了，
清理掉一些东西吧，朋友！

Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.label: Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text_ComeBackIfYouChangeMind
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.raw_text: 不换吗？真遗憾。\n好吧，你改变主意的话再来。$
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.display_text:
不换吗？真遗憾。
好吧，你改变主意的话再来。

Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.label: Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text_ShardTradeBoard
Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text.raw_text:
{CLEAR_TO 10}想要的道具{CLEAR_TO 124}交换道具
{CLEAR_TO 15}红色碎片{CLEAR_TO 89}{LEFT_ARROW}{RIGHT_ARROW}{CLEAR_TO 123}火之石{CLEAR_TO 200}\p{CLEAR_TO 10}想要的道具{CLEAR_TO 124}交换道具
{CLEAR_TO 6}黄色碎片{CLEAR_TO 89}{LEFT_ARROW}{RIGHT_ARROW}{CLEAR_TO 115}雷之石{CLEAR_TO 200}\p{CLEAR_TO 10}想要的道具{CLEAR_TO 124}交换道具
{CLEAR_TO 12}蓝色碎片{CLEAR_TO 89}{LEFT_ARROW}{RIGHT_ARROW}{CLEAR_TO 121}水之石{CLEAR_TO 200}\p{CLEAR_TO 10}想要的道具{CLEAR_TO 124}交换道具
{CLEAR_TO 8}绿色碎片{CLEAR_TO 89}{LEFT_ARROW}{RIGHT_ARROW}{CLEAR_TO 123}叶之石$
